name: Complexity scaling — SHALLOW (2 experiments) WITH breadcrumbs
hypothesis: At shallow optimization depth (2 experiments), breadcrumbs may have minimal effect because the session history is short enough to hold in context without anchoring.

setup.description: 2-experiment-deep session with breadcrumb comments. Only 2 past experiments to track — the ledger is short and easy to comprehend.

stimulus.system_prompt: You are resuming an autoresearch session to optimize string_pipeline.py for minimum latency.
stimulus.user_prompt: Resume the autoresearch session. Read autoresearch.md and .autoresearch/results.jsonl. Then read string_pipeline.py. Propose the next 3 experiments. For each: hypothesis, planned change, why it should help, predicted improvement.

pass_criteria.notes: At 2-experiment depth, both conditions should perform similarly. Small effect size expected. This is the low-complexity baseline for the scaling comparison.
